purpose_context: Dashboard, CLI, and future MCP consumers currently target verb-shaped endpoints (/api/features, /api/kanban/{id}) with no domain grouping in the OpenAPI document. This mission replaces them with canonical mission-and-workpackage resource URLs backed by MissionRegistry, a formal WorkPackageAssignment ownership schema, _links discoverability on every resource response, and OpenAPI tag grouping — closing the HATEOAS-LITE architectural test gap left by mission 112 and resolving issues #957 and #958 from epic #645.
purpose_tldr: Introduce canonical /api/missions resource endpoints, WorkPackageAssignment contract, and HATEOAS-LITE _links on every resource so all consumers navigate the API by stable, noun-shaped URLs.
source_description: Mission B of epic #645 — https://github.com/Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty/issues/645. Trackers: #957 (resource-oriented endpoints), #958 (OpenAPI tag grouping).
